title: Acetaminophen USP bulk — Chapter 29 at 6.5% MFN (non-Free contrast)
source: CROSS NY R04092 — Acetaminophen USP bulk → 2924.29.6210, 6.5% ad valorem (GSP may apply by origin; base MFN not Free). Value contrast vs finished 3004 Free.

value_note.contrast: Finished acetaminophen dosage forms route under heading 3004 (typically Free MFN) — misrouting bulk as 3004 or finished as Ch 29 changes the duty story unlike PPI Free/Free pairs
